## Crypto\_2.KeyStore.KeyStore.changePassword() method

Changes the master password. Re-encrypts the vault with the new password-derived key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
changePassword(currentPassword: string, newPassword: string): Promise<Result<KeyStore>>;
```

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;Result&lt;KeyStore&gt;&gt;

Success when password changed, Failure if locked or current password incorrect
